entries.definition:
t–m–m to overflow, to flood, to inundate, to engulf; the deep sea, the multitude; calamity. Of this root, الطَّامَّة al-ṭāmmatu occurs once in the Qur’an.
طَامَّة ṭāmmatun [fem. act. part.] spectacular occurrence, calamity, the Day of Judgement (79:34–5) فَإِذَا جَاءَتِ الطَّامَّةُ الْكُبْرَى يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ الْإِنسَانُ مَا سَعَى when the great overwhelming event arrives on the Day that man remembers what he has done.

573 ط/ه/ر

573 ط/ه/ر
